trivia_bullets.text: Red-White Mardu instant from Khans of Tarkir (2014-09-26). The Mardu Horde philosophy — 'Those who ride will conquer, while those who stop to meditate will die' — is literalized in this card's design: destroy the blocker, grant trample, keep advancing.
sources: Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Khans of Tarkir Part 2 (magic.wizards.com)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'I will wash you from my hooves!' — Mardu taunt. Attributed to an anonymous Mardu rider; consistent with KTK Mardu flavor text favoring collective/anonymous voice over named heroics.

Illustrated by Daarken (Mike Lim), who has contributed 170+ Magic illustrations since 2006 for Wizards of the Coast, Bethesda, Blizzard, and Games Workshop among others. Print proofs of the Ride Down art — only 50 standard and 30 foil — are sold through his personal shop at daarken.com.

Notably unusual two-mana instant in KTK draft: kills the blocker AND grants trample to formerly-blocked creatures in the same combat. KTK limited primers flag it as a trap for opponents who see open Red-White mana and misread the attack. EDHREC rank 10,305 — best-ranked card of this five-card batch.
sources: Untapped.gg: MTG KTK Draft Combat Tricks

flags.mana_cost_missing: mana_cost field was absent from card frontmatter; confirmed {R}{W} via Scryfall API and patched during this trivia run.
flags.color_magic_tags_missing: Ride Down has red-magic and white-magic in tags_filter — those appear correct per bbl-color-magic-is-filter protocol. No tags_hub color-magic issue.
